document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Tax Payments - Online Tax Payment Platform (OTPP)
text: IRD Sri Lanka Tax Payments - Online Tax Payment Platform, OTPP. The page states that IRD, in collaboration with Lanka Clear Pvt. Ltd, which is governed by the Central Bank of Sri Lanka, introduced OTPP to facilitate real-time online tax payments through LankaPay CEFTS. The facility is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year using the internet banking systems of listed member banks. Taxpayers can use current account or savings accounts maintained at any OTPP member bank. The page further says that because the Central Bank of Sri Lanka granted approval, taxpayers may request an increase in the normal fund transfer limit up to Rs. 10 billion by communicating with their banks. Taxpayers can make online tax payments through CEFTS channels such as internet, mobile, ATM, or over the counter, and these payments are credited in real time on a 24 by 7 basis to IRD tax collection bank accounts subject to banking regulations. IRD will provide real-time payment confirmation by SMS if the taxpayer's mobile number is registered with RAMIS. OTPP is in addition to over-the-counter tax payments by cash or cheque through Bank of Ceylon or People's Bank.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Tax Payments - Online Tax Payment Platform (OTPP)
text: OTPP member banks and enabled channels listed on the page. Bank of Ceylon: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter yes. People's Bank: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter yes. Sampath Bank PLC: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter no. Commercial Bank of Ceylon PLC: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter no. National Savings Bank: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter yes. Nations Trust Bank PLC: internet banking yes, mobile banking no, over the counter yes. National Development Bank: internet banking no, mobile banking no, over the counter yes. Hatton National Bank PLC: internet banking yes, mobile banking yes, over the counter no.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Tax Payments - Online Tax Payment Platform (OTPP)
text: The OTPP page includes a downloads section with a link titled How to Pay Taxes Online, described as the Online Tax Payments Platform, OTPP, Quick Guide.
